You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

MULTIPLIER_EVENT, MultiplierType } from \\\"../Multiplier/MultiplierManager\\\";\\nimport { SHOW_ADD_MULTIPLIER_EVENT } from \\\"../Multiplier/ShowAddMultiplier\\\";\\nimport { FLY_EVENT } from \\\"../FlyManager\\\";\\nimport { BLACK_MASK_EVENT } from \\\"../BlackMaskManager\\\";\\nimport { REEL_MANAGER_EVENT } from \\\"../ReelManager\\\";\\nimport { JP_EVENT } from \\\"../MagicPot/MagicPotController\\\";\\n\\nconst { ccclass } = _decorator;\\n\\n// 進入免費遊戲狀態前的初始等待時間\\nconst ENTER_FREE_INITIAL_DELAY_SECONDS = 1.5;\\n\\n// 輪盤初始化後，開始後續流程前的等待時間\\nconst GOLD_BLITZ_ROULETTE_INIT_DELAY_SECONDS = 0.5;\\n\\n// 輪盤進場前，隱藏其他 UI 的延遲時間\\nconst GOLD_BLITZ_ROULETTE_HIDE_OTHER_UI_DELAY_SECONDS = 0.5;\\n\\n// 輪盤完成後，重新顯示其他 UI 的延遲時間\\nconst GOLD_BLITZ_ROULETTE_SHOW_OTHER_UI_DELAY_SECONDS = 3;\\n\\n// 現金飛分演出次數\\nconst FREE_GAME_ADD_CASH_ANIMATION_COUNT = 15;\\n\\n// 現金飛分演出的目標索引\\nconst FREE_GAME_ADD_CASH_ANIMATION_TARGET_INDEXES = [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5];\\n\\n// 現金飛分演出的每次間隔時間\\nconst FREE_GAME_ADD_CASH_ANIMATION_INTERVAL_SECONDS = 0.1;\\n\\n/**@ch EnterFreeState 狀態機階段*/\\nenum EnterFreeStatePhase {\\n    IDLE = 0,                      // 初始狀態\\n    SPINNING = 1,                  // 轉輪旋轉中，等待演出完成\\n    COMPLETED = 2                  // 轉輪停止，演出完成，準備跳轉\\n}\\n\\n@ccclass( \\\"EnterFreeState\\\" )\\nexport class EnterFreeState extends BaseState\\n{\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 是否播放輪盤完成*/\\n    private m_isPlayGoldBlitzRouletteFinish: boolean = false;\\n\\n    /**@ch 當前狀態階段*/\\n    private m_phase: EnterFreeStatePhase = EnterFreeStatePhase.IDLE;\\n\\n    /**@ch 倍率演出是否完成*/\\n    private m_isMultiplierAnimFinish: boolean = false;\\n\\n    /**@ch 現金演出是否完成*/\\n    private m_isCashAnimFinish: boolean = false;\\n\\n    constructor( gameView: GameView )\\n    {\\n        super();\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n    }\\n\\n    public async OnEnter()\\n    {\\n        log( \\\"OnEnter State : ENTER_FREE\\\" );\\n\\n        await Define.Wait(this.m_gameView, ENTER_FREE_INITIAL_DELAY_SECONDS);\\n\\n        // 暫停主遊戲背景音樂\\n        this.m_gameView.PauseMainGameBgm();\\n\\n        newBottombarManager.SetEnterFree();\\n        this.StopEffect();\\n        this.m_gameView.IsFreeGame = true;\\n\\n        newBottombarManager.SetBarNodeVisiable( false );\\n        this.m_gameView.BuyBonus?.SetBuyBtnVisible( false );        \\n\\n        // 鎖定方向\\n        Common.SetLockOrientation(true);\\n\\n        // 播放輪盤\\n        await this.PlayGoldBlitzRoulette();\\n\\n        // 播放免費遊戲音樂\\n        this.m_gameView.PlayFreeGameBgm();\\n\\n        // 準備進入免費遊戲\\n        newBottombarManager.SetBarNodeVisiable(true);\\n\\n        // 顯示免費遊戲回合數字\\n        eventManager.Dispatch(FREE_GAME_ROUND_UI_EVENT.SHOW);\\n\\n        // 開始Spin\\n        // 注意：EnterFreeState 進入時 CurPlateIndex 仍是 main game 的值，但要播的是 FreeGame round 1。\\n        // 顯式傳入 +1 偏移取得正確的 fileIndex（與 SetRealPlateInfo 用 CurPlateIndex+1 取資料的語意對齊）。\\n        // this.m_gameView.StartSpin(this.m_gameView.SlotReels.ResolveFakeReelFileIndex(1));\\n\\n        // 設定所有轉輪符號顯示模式為只顯示Blank\\n        this.m_gameView.SetAllReelSymbolMode( ReelSymbolMode.OnlyBlank );\\n        this.m_gameView.SetSlotReelCanPlaySymbolAudio( false );\\n\\n        // 初始化狀態標誌\\n        this.m_isMultiplierAnimFinish = false;\\n        this.m_isCashAnimFinish = false;\\n        this.m_phase = EnterFreeStatePhase.SPINNING;\\n\\n        // 播放免費遊戲加倍演出，完成後才開始現金演出\\n        void this.PlayFreeGameAddMultiplierAnim().then(() => {\\n            if ( !this.m_gameView?.node?.isValid ) return;\\n            this.m_isMultiplierAnimFinish = true;\\n\\n            // 倍率演出完成後，才開始現金演出\\n            void this.PlayFreeGameAddCashAnim().then(() => {\\n                if ( !this.m_gameView?.node?.isValid ) return;\\n                this.m_isCashAnimFinish = true;\\n            }).catch( e => console.warn( \\\"[EnterFreeState] PlayFreeGameAddCashAnim error:\\\", e ) );\\n        }).catch( e => console.warn( \\\"[EnterFreeState] PlayFreeGameAddMultiplierAnim error:\\\", e ) );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess( dt: number = 0 )\\n    {\\n        // 只有在 SPINNING 狀態才需要處理\\n        if ( this.m_phase !== EnterFreeStatePhase.SPINNING )\\n        {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 更新轉輪旋轉\\n        this.m_gameView.SlotReels.Spin( dt );\\n\\n        // 檢查演出是否全部完成\\n        if ( !this.m_isMultiplierAnimFinish || !this.m_isCashAnimFinish )\\n        {\\n            // 演出未完成，持續旋轉\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 取消 FlyManager AddCash 延遲 callback（避免晚到 callback 在下一行 Normal 設定後把 col 改回 CashAndBlank）\\n        eventManager.Dispatch( FLY_EVENT.CANCEL_ADD_CASH_ANIMATION );\\n\\n        // 演出剛結束，切回 Normal 符號模式（BC-5；轉動中切換，1-frame 內可能有符號突現，Phase 4 dev preview 觀察重點）\\n        this.m_gameView.SetAllReelSymbolMode( ReelSymbolMode.Normal );\\n\\n        this.m_phase = EnterFreeStatePhase.COMPLETED;\\n\\n        // 處理 AutoSpin UI（移除原 SetSpinState(IDLE)，SpinState.OnEnter 會自行設 START_SPIN）\\n        if ( newBottombarManager.IsAutoSpin && this.m_gameView.AutoplayInfos.isCheckFree )\\n        {\\n            newBottombarManager.ShowAutoPlayState( false );\\n        }\\n\\n        // BC-2：統一設 IsFirstRound=false → RoundEndState.ForEndToNext 走 SPIN 分支（不再 IDLE 等點擊）\\n        this.m_gameView.IsFirstRound = false;\\n\\n        // BC-3：請 RoundEndState 跳過 0.5s noWin 緩衝（讀完即清，見 RoundEndState.OnEnter）\\n        this.m_gameView.SkipFreeGameNoWinDelay = true;\\n\\n        // BC-7：請 SpinState 對 SlotReels.StartSpin 傳 continueSpin=true（保留時間軸與 ColumnSymbol 視覺位置同步）\\n        this.m_gameView.IsFreeGameFirstSpinContinuous = true;\\n\\n        // 跳轉到下一個狀態\\n        stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_END );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnLeave()\\n    {\\n        this.m_gameView.SetAllReelSymbolMode( ReelSymbolMode.Normal );\\n        this.m_gameView.SetSlotReelCanPlaySymbolAudio( true );\\n\\n        eventManager.UnRegister( GOLD_BLITZ_ROULETTE_EVENT.ROTATE_COMPLETE, this );\\n\\n        // 重置狀態標誌\\n        this.m_phase = EnterFreeStatePhase.IDLE;\\n        this.m_isMultiplierAnimFinish = false;\\n        this.m_isCashAnimFinish = false;\\n        this.m_isPlayGoldBlitzRouletteFinish = false;\\n\\n        // 解除鎖定\\n        Common.SetLockOrientation(false);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 停止效果\\n     */\\n    private StopEffect()\\n    {\\n        this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.StopOneLineShow();\\n        this.m_gameView.ClearAll();\\n        this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.CurAwardLines.length = 0;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件處理\\n     * @param event 事件名稱\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     */\\n    OnEvent( event: string, ...args: any[] )\\n    {\\n        switch ( event ) {\\n            case GOLD_BLITZ_ROULETTE_EVENT.ROTATE_COMPLETE:\\n                this.m_isPlayGoldBlitzRouletteFinish = true;\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放輪盤\\n     */\\n    async PlayGoldBlitzRoulette() : Promise<void>\\n    {\\n        log( \\\"PlayGoldBlitzRoulette\\\" );\\n\\n        if (!this.m_gameView.GoldBlitzRouletteWheelData || this.m_gameView.GoldBlitzRouletteWheelData.length <= 0) {\\n            error(\\\"[EnterFreeState] GoldBlitzRouletteWheelData is invalid\\\");\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        if Now I see actual implementation work happening! The user added a new method `SetFeatureWheelLayer` to `GameView.ts`. This is a helper method to switch FeatureWheel data layers between MainGame and FreeGame.

Let me document this observation:

- **Type**: feature (new capability added)
- **Title**: Added SetFeatureWheelLayer helper method to GameView
- **Subtitle**: Centralized method to switch FeatureWheel data layers between MainGame and FreeGame
- **Facts**:
  - New public method SetFeatureWheelLayer() added to GameView.ts
  - Method accepts WheelDataLayer parameter (MainGame or FreeGame)
  - Dispatches FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA with parsed server wheel data
  - Uses m_goldBlitzRouletteWheelData as data source (stored from info.WheelData)
  - ParseServerWheelData automatically returns default 12 segments if layer has no data
- **Narrative**: GameView now provides a centralized SetFeatureWheelLayer() method to switch the FeatureWheel UI between MainGame and FreeGame data layers. The method reads from m_goldBlitzRouletteWheelData (which stores the two-layer structure received from info.WheelData at load time) and dispatches the appropriate layer through ParseServerWheelData. This helper will be called when entering FreeGame to feed the FreeGame layer, and when leaving FreeGame to restore the MainGame layer. If a layer contains no data, ParseServerWheelData automatically falls back to a default 12-segment configuration.
- **Concepts**: how-it-works, pattern
- **Files modified**: assets/Script/GameView.ts

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Added SetFeatureWheelLayer helper method to GameView</title>
  <subtitle>Centralized method to switch FeatureWheel data layers between MainGame and FreeGame</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>New public method SetFeatureWheelLayer() added to GameView.ts at line 660</fact>
    <fact>Method accepts WheelDataLayer parameter (MainGame or FreeGame) to select which layer to display</fact>
    <fact>Dispatches FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA with parsed server wheel data for the specified layer</fact>
    <fact>Uses m_goldBlitzRouletteWheelData as data source (stored from info.WheelData at load time)</fact>
    <fact>ParseServerWheelData automatically returns default 12 segments if the specified layer has no data</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>GameView now provides a centralized SetFeatureWheelLayer() method to switch the FeatureWheel UI between MainGame and FreeGame data layers. The method reads from m_goldBlitzRouletteWheelData (which stores the two-layer structure received from info.WheelData at load time) and dispatches the appropriate layer through ParseServerWheelData. This helper will be called when entering FreeGame to feed the FreeGame layer, and when leaving FreeGame to restore the MainGame layer. If a layer contains no data, ParseServerWheelData automatically falls back to a default 12-segment configuration, ensuring the wheel always has valid data to display.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/GameView.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

content.thinking:
The user is showing me two consecutive edits to EnterFreeState.ts:

1. First edit: Added import for WheelDataLayer
2. Second edit: Added call to SetFeatureWheelLayer(WheelDataLayer.FreeGame) when entering free game

This is implementing the feature wheel layer switching functionality - when entering the free game, it switches the wheel data to the FreeGame layer so the wheel displays the correct icons for free game rounds rather than continuing to use the MainGame layer icons.

This is a feature implementation that uses the helper method that was just added to GameView.ts.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>EnterFreeState now switches FeatureWheel to FreeGame layer</title>
  <subtitle>When entering free game, wheel data layer switches to FreeGame preventing MG icons from displaying</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>EnterFreeState.ts imports WheelDataLayer from FeatureWheelTypes</fact>
    <fact>SetFeatureWheelLayer(WheelDataLayer.FreeGame) called after IsFreeGame flag set to true</fact>
    <fact>Call positioned at line 86-87 in OnEnter() method before bar visibility changes</fact>
    <fact>Comment explains this prevents FG round wheel演出 from mistakenly using MG layout icons</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>EnterFreeState now switches the FeatureWheel data layer when entering free game mode. After setting the IsFreeGame flag to true, the state calls the newly added SetFeatureWheelLayer() helper method with WheelDataLayer.FreeGame parameter. This ensures that during free game rounds, the wheel feature displays the correct FreeGame layer icons rather than continuing to use the MainGame layer visuals. The placement of this call immediately after the IsFreeGame flag assignment ensures the wheel data is ready before any UI visibility changes or wheel animations begin.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/GameState/EnterFreeState.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>LeaveFreeState now restores FeatureWheel to MainGame layer</title>
  <subtitle>When exiting free game, wheel data layer switches back to MainGame preventing FG icons from persisting</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>LeaveFreeState.ts imports WheelDataLayer from FeatureWheelTypes</fact>
    <fact>SetFeatureWheelLayer(WheelDataLayer.MainGame) called after IsFreeGame flag set to false</fact>
    <fact>Call positioned at line 67-68 in LeaveFreeSetting() method before orientation lock</fact>
    <fact>Comment explains this prevents wheel from retaining FG layout icons after returning to main game</fact>
    <fact>Symmetric implementation with EnterFreeState (FG layer on enter, MG layer on leave)</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>LeaveFreeState now restores the FeatureWheel data layer when exiting free game mode. After clearing the IsFreeGame flag to false, the state calls SetFeatureWheelLayer() with WheelDataLayer.MainGame parameter to reset the wheel back to main game visuals. This completes a symmetric layer-switching pattern: EnterFreeState switches to the FreeGame layer on entry, and LeaveFreeState restores the MainGame layer on exit. This prevents FreeGame wheel icons from persisting into main game rounds after the free game session ends.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>

    <file>assets/Script/GameState/LeaveFreeState.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
